description: Mock Looker-style report inventory for BI-Pruner. Exactly two reports (look:201 and look:202) share logically equivalent SQL; projection order and formatting differ. Hash with structuralHashFromSql(sql, 'bigquery') to match ingestion.

looker_reports.title: Daily revenue by region
looker_reports.sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM analytics.sales WHERE sale_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - 7 GROUP BY region ORDER BY revenue DESC

looker_reports.title: Active subscribers count
looker_reports.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS subscriber_count FROM analytics.subscriptions WHERE status = 'active' AND ended_at IS NULL

looker_reports.title: Customer LTV rollup (variant A)
looker_reports.sql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(order_total) AS revenue FROM warehouse.fct_orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY customer_id
looker_reports._test_note: Logically identical to look:202 — projection order and whitespace differ.

looker_reports.title: Customer LTV rollup (variant B)
looker_reports.sql:
SELECT
  sum(order_total) AS revenue,
  customer_id
FROM warehouse.fct_orders
WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY customer_id

looker_reports.title: Churn risk scores
looker_reports.sql: SELECT user_id, MAX(last_login_at) AS last_seen FROM analytics.events GROUP BY user_id HAVING last_seen < TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

looker_reports.title: Inventory levels by SKU
looker_reports.sql: SELECT sku, warehouse_id, quantity_on_hand FROM supply_chain.inventory_snapshot WHERE snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE()

looker_reports.title: Marketing spend vs conversions
looker_reports.sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(spend_usd) AS spend, SUM(conversions) AS conv FROM marketing.campaign_daily GROUP BY campaign_id

looker_reports.title: Support ticket backlog
looker_reports.sql: SELECT priority, COUNT(*) AS open_tickets FROM support.tickets WHERE status = 'open' GROUP BY priority

looker_reports.title: Fulfillment SLA breaches
looker_reports.sql: SELECT fulfillment_center, COUNT(*) AS late_shipments FROM logistics.shipments WHERE promised_date < actual_ship_date AND ship_month = '2026-04' GROUP BY fulfillment_center

looker_reports.title: Pipeline by stage
looker_reports.sql: SELECT stage, SUM(amount_usd) AS pipeline_value FROM crm.opportunities WHERE is_open = TRUE GROUP BY stage ORDER BY pipeline_value DESC
